title: Observation droid
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the observation droids used by pit racing organizers|the [[Observation droid (Clone Wars)/Legends|observation droids]] used during the Clone Wars}}
[[File:Spydroid.jpg|thumb]]
'''Observation droids''' were used by [[pit racing]] organizers on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. One such [[Droid/Legends|droid]] kept [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] under constant surveillance during his time on [[The Rig]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Rogue Planet]]'' {{1st|in book}}
*[[Republic 65|''Republic'' 65]]
*[[Republic 66|''Republic'' 66]]

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-06-XX -->''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]''
*<!-- 1995-04-XX -->''[[Flashpoint! Brak Sector]]''
